feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ERROR: Failed to send AR Invoice Update the exchange rate
entry.content:
We are preparing for a large physical sale event in London from April 24th to 27th and need some assistance in ensuring that all sales process correctly through Shopify while also being able to identify sales item vs usual item.
Last year, we processed sales through the Shopify UK Point of Sale (POS) channel and tagged sale items so we could separate transactions at the end of the day. Given that we have more time to prepare this year, we created a separate POS "sale" channel in Shopify specifically for this event. This sales channel is also linked to an API following the same logic as  both API UK 6 Silver Place - POS Orders 
We have recently duplicated our POS api's in the UK to be able to process orders from multiple shopify location. Even though the API's are exact duplicated of our current connection in terms of logic, we get the below error: 
 
ERROR: Failed to send AR Invoice (ID: 11585479049602/Number: CO29046) to SAP: Update the exchange rate
 
This connection has 3 differences to our current ones: 

 
1.The GL account is the sales Revenue which is 400005 - Sales revenue Pop-ups UK.
2.  The warehouse code to be 03 rather than 02
3. The location is linked to 103733657986 (see attached) on shopify, this is our new Pop up location. 
 
I've cross checked multiple times and the changes made have been cross checked and everything seems to be set as it should be. 
 
The payload that failed can be found below, thank you in advance for your help!
 
{
  "U_PTA_order_id": 11585479049602,
  "U_Magento_WebId": 11585479049602,
  "NumAtCard": "CO29046",
  "TotalDiscount": 0,
  "DocTotal": 4,
  "DocCur": "GBP",
  "CardCode": "CNL254995",
  "DocDate": "2025-03-10",
  "DocDueDate": "2025-03-10",
  "ShippingMethod": "8",
  "JournalMemo": "POS Invoice %s Payment Method: %s",
  "Comments": "POS Invoice %s Payment Method: %s",
  "TotalDiscountSC": 0,
  "paymentMethods": "Credit Card",
  "customer": {
    "CardName": " ",
    "CardType": "C",
    "GroupCode": "105",
    "CompanyPrivate": "cCompany",
    "Series": "69",
    "Phone1": "",
    "EmailAddress": "l@p.nl",
    "Address": "",
    "City": null,
    "County": null,
    "Country": null,
    "ZipCode": null,
    "MailAddress": null,
    "MailCity": null,
    "MailCounty": null,
    "MailCountry": null,
    "MailZipCode": null,
    "PriceListNum": "9"
  },
  "DocumentLines": [
    {
      "ItemCode": "PA-AW23-5-O-CLOCK-L-001",
      "Quantity": 1,
      "Price": 3.3333,
      "AccountCode": "140100",
      "GOGSAccountCode": "400005",
      "WarehouseCode": "03",
      "TaxCode": "O1"
    }
  ]

entry.title: Reporte para Cobranza
entry.content: Quiero saber como hacer un query en el que pueda ver todos mis clientes cuanto me deben, cuando fue su ultimo pago y cuanto pago esa ultima vez. me pidieron este reporte por que dan credito y quieren saber cuales clientes dejan de pagar.

entry.title: Page Footer Supress Does Not Work Properly
entry.content:
This is a problem I've had since 2011 at the beginning of Crystal Reports, and it still occurs today in the 2020 SP4/P4 version (14 year of problem).

When a page footer is defined and suppressed without formula, the detail takes advantage of the entire sheet with the records.

When it is suppressed via formula, it does not take over the space.

SAP Crystal Reports 

See code Archive RPT example 

Rgs

Fabio

SAP 10 FP2502 / SQL SERVER 2019 / SAP HANA

entry.title: Inquiry Financial Report Templates Settings
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support

I am writing to inquire about the Financial Report Templates Settings

To Change the criteria used for generating standard accounts in the income statement template, what steps should be taken?

Capital is not part of the income accounts, but it is currently included, so i would like to adjust this criterion.

Below attachment

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your guidance.

Best regards

entry.title: SAP Business One SDK - LoadFromDataSource(), FlushToDataSource(), how to store data back to UDT?
entry.content:
I've created my own User-defined table and use it in my editable matrix sending data back and forth to DBDataSource with LoadFromDataSource() and FlushToDataSource()

The question is, to store data, including insert, update and delete, back to UDT, do I need to manually loop over rows in the matrix, then run .Update(), .Add() or .Remove() myself or is there a way to manage it automatically?

I'm stuck at FlushToDataSource() after clicked on a Update button and ChatGPT taught me to manually set the data back, but I don't think it's an efficient way and tried to find other ways in UI and DI manual but not found anything.

Here is my code

if (pVal.ItemUID == "1" && pVal.FormMode == (int)SAPbouiCOM.BoFormMode.fm_UPDATE_MODE && pVal.EventType == SAPbouiCOM.BoEventTypes.et_ITEM_PRESSED && pVal.BeforeAction == true)
{
    SAPbouiCOM.Form oForm = oApp.Forms.Item(pVal.FormUID);
    SAPbouiCOM.Matrix oMatrix = (SAPbouiCOM.Matrix)oForm.Items.Item("matrix").Specific;
                        
    oMatrix.FlushToDataSource();

    SAPbouiCOM.DBDataSource oDBDataSource = oForm.DataSources.DBDataSources.Item("@myUDT");
                        
    ...here is where I'm stuck.

}

entry.title: Set G/L Accounts by in the latest SAP Business One release.
entry.content:
Greetings Community,

I'm Struggling to find the "Set G/L Accounts by" as it is on TB1100_EN_Col10 training Manual (page 46). I'm not sure if it was moved or removed from the system or even there are updated training manuals. I'm using SAP B11000-2502-70004131 (SQL) and the training Manuals where downloaded from the learning hub. (screens attached).

From the HELP Portal I get the same information as on the training Manual. I'm training an internal team and I don't know what to do.

Your help will be much appreciated.

Thank you in advance

Santos Joao

entry.title: Using Ctrl + P on SAP B1 Web Browser
entry.content:
Dear  Expert,

Can we use shortcut key as Ctrl + P , Ctrl + S for Layout printing on Web browser?

Best Regards,
Peearput

entry.title: Blueprint Configuration and Questions Templates for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear Expert

Were can I find Templates for BluePrint Process Question and BluePrint Configuration for SAP Business One 10.

These documents are mentionned in Page 20 of TB1200 documentation.

Thanks

Boukhary

entry.title: Last Purchase price in A/P and last landed cost Query
entry.content:
Dear All,

I need a Query for the last purchase price in an A/P Invoice , A/P reserve Invoice with  Docnum, docdate,Doccur, Itemcode,dscription,  Quantity unitprice and UOM linked to last Landed cost with Docnum, doccur,dscription, quantity, priceFOB, TtlexpndLC and Unitmsr.

 

Not with a date rage. If there is no landed cost available then the landed cost value fields can be empty. Sometimes the company receives the landed cost late. Its how they work.

The reason for the A/P invoice last purchase price is because the currency in the a/p invoice is different from the Local and system currency.

PLease help!!!

 

This is what I have now, but I need the Last invoice created and the A/P or A/P reserve should not be canceled. And linked to the last landed cost and GRPO.

SELECT t0.docentry , T0.docdate , T1.itemcode, T1.Dscription, T1.Quantity,T0.doccur, T1.price , T1.unitmsr FROM OPCH
T0 inner join PCH1 T1 ON T0.Docentry =T1.docentry
where t1.itemcode like 'raw%' or T1.itemcode like 'pack%' and T0.canceled ='N'

I really need the experts help.

entry.title: Does SAP B1 PLD Have a Hidden Business Partner Code for Account Balance?
entry.content:
SAP B1 v10

Hello,

I'm creating a custom layout for Account Balance in SAP Business One Print Layout Designer, and I noticed that two text fields display the customer name and customer account number, but they do not reference any database field.

Here is the data for these fields:

Field 1 (Customer Name)
- Unique ID: `F_021`
- Field Type: `Text`
- Link To: (Nothing)*
- Source Type: `Free Text`

Field 2 (Customer Account Number)
- Unique ID: `F_022`
- Field Type: `Text`
- Link To: (Nothing)*
- Source Type: `Free Text`

Despite being Free Text fields, `F_021` correctly outputs the customer name, and `F_022` correctly outputs the customer account number.

My Questions:*
1. How is SAP B1 PLD retrieving this data if these fields are set as Free Text?
2. Does SAP B1 internally map `F_021` and `F_022` to the Business Partner (`OCRD.CardCode`)?
3. Is there a hidden variable or system function that automatically fills these values?
4. How can I manually reference these fields if I want to use them elsewhere?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: Problems with the service layer in the Order POST
entry.content:
I use this endpoint
POST: http://xxxxxx:50003/b1s/v1/Orders
with this JSON

 

{

    "CardCode": "10260237-4C",

    "DocDate": "2025-03-19",

    "SalesPersonCode": -1,

    "Rounding": "tNO",

    "DocumentSubType": "bod_None",

    "Series": 13,

    "Comments": “Test",

    "DocumentLines": [

        {

            "ItemCode": "A00001",

            "PriceAfterVAT": 1785.0,

            "Quantity": 1.0,

            "TaxCode": "IVA",

            "WarehouseCode": "01"

        }

    ]

}

The response is :

{
    "error": {
        "code": -1,
        "message": {
            "lang": "en-us",
            "value": "BadFormat"
        }
    }
}
I changed the json to something simpler, but the error is the same.
{
    "CardCode": "10260237-4C",
    "DocDate": "2025-03-19",
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "ItemCode": "A00001",
            "Quantity": 1.0
        }
    ]
}
The product and business partner exist and are active
What's the problem? What am I missing?

entry.title: SAP B1 Web Client Extension Not Working
entry.content:
We developed an extension as mentioned in the learning hub "Developing Extensions for SAP Business One and the Web Client" and Unit 2 section Creating UI Extensions to Customize SAP Business One, Web Client Views. But when we try to click on the button but no information showing after clicking the button which is developed as mentioned in the learning content. When we do the inspect or troubleshoot that time we found out that its redirect the url to https://<hostname>:5443/svcl/b1s/v2/CompanyService_GetCompanyInfo. But there is nothing mentioned about SVCL redirection i can see other redirection like tcli which is working on SAP B1 web client but i am not able to find any documentation or content regarding svcl redirection for extension.

Regards,

Tushar Nathvani

#SAPBusinessOneWebClient #SAPBusinessOne SAP Business One SAP Business One Extensibility

entry.title: Inventory Posting of stock count items row limits
entry.content:
Hi All

I would like to ask if there is an increase in row limits for Inventory Posting of stock count items in SAP version 10 as the previous version 9 limits the rows to 999?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: PO Unit Price Exceeds Budget – Approval Query Issue
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to trigger an approval process if the unit price in the purchase order document exceeds the budget allocated to the corresponding G/L account. I have written an approval query for this, but it is not working as expected. The issue is that it also triggers approval for unit prices that are within the budget limits.

Could you help me rewrite the approval query correctly? Here is the query I have written:

SELECT DISTINCT 'TRUE' FROM OPOR T0
INNER JOIN POR1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
INNER JOIN OBGT T2 ON T2."AcctCode" = T1."AcctCode"
INNER JOIN BGT1 T3 ON T2."AbsId" = T3."BudgId"

WHERE $[$38.14.NUMBER] > T2."DebLTotal"
AND T2."DebLTotal" > 0
AND T2."FinancYear" = '2025-01-01'

Thanks. Regards.

entry.title: Approval Query for A/P Invoice Changes from Approved PO
entry.content:
Hi experts,

What approval query should be written to trigger approval for an A/P Invoice, if any data from the approved Purchase Order document, from which the A/P Invoice was created, is modified?

Thanks. Regards.

entry.title: The capability of SAP B1 to handle 10,000 invoices per day.
entry.content: Hi Experts.  There are rumors among SAP B1 competitors that SAP B1 can handle only about 2500 invoices per day.  My question is “From a technical standpoint, can SAP B1 handle loading up to 10,000 invoices per day, where each invoice contains an average of 10 inventory items (i.e., around 100,000 records per day), given that the database is SQL Server and invoices are loaded via API in daily time intervals?”

entry.title: Regarding the Depreciation Area Inquiry
entry.content:
When intangible assets are depreciated using the direct method, how should the depreciation area for the asset class be set?

The default depreciation area is for the indirect method, and I added a depreciation area for the direct method, which was then assigned to asset classes requiring the direct method.

For the indirect method, I set the depreciation type as "No Depreciation," and for the direct method, I set the depreciation type as "Straight-Line Method."

Is this the general setup? Please confirm.

below attachment is "Asset Class" form

Thank you.

entry.title: Closing a large number of A/R invoices by a deposit transaction
entry.content: A customer has been using SAP B1 HANA version for their logistics, not for financial management for the last 4 year, now they would like to use it for financial management as well as logistics.  They would like to close a large number of AR invoices which has been accumulated for the last 4 year, as a B2C online business company.  I tried to open the deposit transaction with a specific BP no, but the message shows that the no of open AR is over 80000, so this can lead to SAP B1 error.  I did not go ahead.   Is there any other method to close a large no of AR more than 100,000 efficiently ?

entry.title: SAP Business One 10.0 FP2305 DIServer always gives "wrong user id and password" in login response.
entry.content: SAP Business One 10.0 FP2305 DIServer always gives "wrong user id and password" in login response even if user has correct credentials and I have assigned a professional license to B1i user. Any help will be appreciated.

entry.title: IMMOBILIZATION WITH VAT IN SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,

If I purchase a fixed asset on SAP and apply a 20% VAT,
the acquisition value of my fixed asset is the amount excluding tax (HT), not the amount including tax (amount after VAT), so the planned depreciation is excluding tax, but that's not what I need; I want to depreciate the amount including tax;
For that, I performed an asset revaluation on SAP and defined the amount including tax, but always the same planned depreciation.

Any idea?

Exemple: 

Fixed Asset IM005517
Excluding VAT: 22,000.00
Including VAT: 26,000.00
Planned Depreciation: 122.00
Desired Depreciation: 144.00

Regards.
